examples.title: Cross-validation Implementation
examples.code:
from sklearn.model_selection import StratifiedKFold
skf = StratifiedKFold(n_splits=5)
for train_idx, test_idx in skf.split(X, y):
    X_train, X_test = X[train_idx], X[test_idx]
    y_train, y_test = y[train_idx], y[test_idx]

examples.title: Statistical Significance Testing
examples.code:
model1_scores <- c(0.85, 0.82, 0.88)
model2_scores <- c(0.80, 0.78, 0.83)
t.test(model1_scores, model2_scores, paired=TRUE)
examples.explanation: Tests if performance difference is statistically significant
